students.title: Students
students.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this student?

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this teacher?

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.subject: Subject
schedule.description: Manage and view lesson schedules by month.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.tabsDescription: Admin generates Attendance tabs and lesson days; teachers mark attendance in Google Sheets.
attendance.createHint: Select group + subject, then pick lesson days on the calendar.
attendance.lessonDaysHint: Click dates to select multiple days. These will become date columns in the Sheet.
attendance.assignmentCountHint: This controls HW1..HWN columns in the Grades spreadsheet.
attendance.noTabsDescription: Create an attendance tab for a group + subject to start taking attendance in Sheets.
attendance.viewHint: This is a live preview of the Google Sheet. If you recently changed values, run sync in Sheets → Attendance.
attendance.emptyPreview: No data in this tab yet.
attendance.editHint: Editing only adds missing date columns (it won’t delete existing columns).
attendance.unmappedEditHint: This tab is not mapped to an existing Group/Subject in DB, so it can’t be edited here.

grades.title: Grades
grades.tabsDescription: Admin can preview Grades (Baholash) tabs; teachers fill grades directly in Google Sheets.
grades.noTabsDescription: Create an Attendance tab (with assignment count) to auto-generate a matching Grades tab.
grades.viewHint: This is a live preview of the Google Sheet. Teachers enter grades directly in Google Sheets (columns after C).
grades.emptyPreview: No data in this tab yet.
grades.editHint: Edits here update the Grades sheet directly.
grades.editFooterHint: Tip: Use Sheets → Grades → Force Sync if roster (A–C) looks outdated.

sheetsGrades.description: Manage synchronization and preview the Grades (Baholash) spreadsheet.

groups.title: Groups
groups.noGroupsDescription: Create groups first, then you can view students by group here
groups.noStudentsDescription: No students found in this group
